task_completion.description: Agent initiates and completes a crawl of books.toscrape.com using Screaming Frog SEO Spider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog UI is visible with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' in the URL bar. The crawl progress bar should reach 100% or a 'Crawl Limit Reached' dialog should appear (due to the 500 URL free tier limit).

task_completion.description: Agent exports data from the Internal, Page Titles, and Meta Description tabs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent clicking the 'Export' button on these tabs and saving files named 'baseline_internal_html.csv', 'baseline_page_titles.csv', and 'baseline_meta_descriptions.csv' to the ~/Documents/SEO/exports/ directory.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses the hidden Images tab and exports the data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Agent clicks the tab overflow dropdown arrow (near the end of the main tab bar) to select 'Images', then clicks Export and saves 'baseline_images.csv'.

task_completion.description: Agent exports All Inlinks via the Bulk Export menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Agent navigates the top menu bar to 'Bulk Export' -> 'Links' -> 'All Inlinks' and saves the file as 'baseline_all_inlinks.csv'.

task_completion.description: Agent writes the migration baseline report containing the exact required metrics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Mousepad, nano, vim) is open showing the report text with the exact counts: 276 (HTML pages), 0 (missing titles), 11 (duplicate titles), 59 (missing meta descriptions), and 0 (missing image alt text).

task_completion.description: Agent includes the top 3 issues ranked by count, with risk assessments and recommendations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows a ranked list of top 3 issues (Missing meta descriptions as #1, Duplicate page titles as #2, and a 0-count issue as #3), along with text describing migration risks and remediation steps for each.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl and exports.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Screaming Frog interface being actively used, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts generating mock CSV files.

integrity.description: Agent viewed the crawl data to determine the counts rather than hallucinating them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent should be seen looking at the overview pane in Screaming Frog, applying filters, or opening the exported CSV files to calculate the metrics.

integrity.description: Agent wrote the report in a text editor rather than using a single automated command with pre-computed text.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor GUI or terminal editor should be visible with the agent typing or pasting the report contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is https://books.toscrape.com/. Ground truth counts from the crawl: Total HTML pages = 276. Missing page titles = 0. Duplicate page titles = 11. Missing meta descriptions = 59. Missing image alt text = 0. Top 3 issues by affected page count must be: (1) Missing meta descriptions (59 pages), (2) Duplicate page titles (11 pages), (3) Any other metric (0 pages). The Images tab is hidden in the tab overflow dropdown. All Inlinks is exported via the top menu: Bulk Export > Links > All Inlinks.
